summary: Comprehensive testing of Hero Banner and Referral features. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Fixed token mismatch bug in referralApi.js and heroBannerApi.js. All frontend features working correctly including Hero Carousel with auto-rotation, Referral Landing Page, My Referrals dashboard with social sharing, and Admin Hero Banners management.

TestHeroBannersAdmin.test_create_banner: PASS - Creates and deletes test banner

TestReferralPublic.test_get_referral_by_code: PASS - Returns referrer info with 10% discount

hero_carousel.displays_banners: PASS - Shows 3 seeded banners with titles, subtitles, badges
hero_carousel.dot_indicators: PASS - 3 dots, clickable for direct navigation
hero_carousel.primary_cta: PASS - Shop Now, Start a Project buttons visible
hero_carousel.secondary_cta: PASS - View Offers, Learn More buttons visible

referral_landing_page.discount_display: PASS - Shows '10% off your first order'

admin_hero_banners_page.create_form: PASS - All fields present (title, subtitle, description, images, CTAs, etc.)
admin_hero_banners_page.banner_list: PASS - Shows 3 existing banners with thumbnails
admin_hero_banners_page.edit_buttons: PASS - Edit buttons present for each banner
admin_hero_banners_page.delete_buttons: PASS - Delete buttons present for each banner

my_referrals_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Referrals, Successful, Total Earned
my_referrals_page.share_whatsapp_btn: PASS - Links to wa.me with message
my_referrals_page.referral_activity: PASS - Shows 'No referrals yet' empty state

customer_dashboard.my_referrals_card: PASS - Card visible with 'Share your code and earn rewards'

bugs_fixed.issue: Token key mismatch - was looking for 'token' and 'adminToken' but auth stores as 'konekt_token' and 'konekt_admin_token'
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated getAuthHeader() to use correct localStorage keys
Updated getAuthHeader() to use correct localStorage keys

seed_data_creation: 3 hero banners were pre-seeded: 'New Year Sale', 'Creative Services', 'KonektSeries Collection'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero Banner and Referral features fully tested and working. Key components: 1) HeroCarousel on landing page with 3 seeded banners, 5-second auto-rotation, 2) Admin Hero Banners page at /admin/hero-banners for CRUD operations, 3) Referral landing page at /r/{code} shows discount and create account CTA, 4) My Referrals page at /dashboard/referrals with social sharing buttons (WhatsApp, Facebook, X, Email), 5) Customer Dashboard has My Referrals card linking to /dashboard/referrals. Fixed token mismatch bug in referralApi.js and heroBannerApi.js.
features_verified: GET /api/hero-banners/active - Returns active banners sorted by position - WORKING
GET /api/hero-banners/admin - Returns all banners (requires auth) - WORKING
GET /api/referrals/code/{code} - Returns referrer info and discount - WORKING
GET /api/referrals/settings/public - Returns referral program settings - WORKING
GET /api/customer/referrals/me - Returns user's referral data - WORKING
Hero Carousel on landing page with auto-rotation and navigation - WORKING
Admin Hero Banners management page at /admin/hero-banners - WORKING
My Referrals page with social sharing buttons - WORKING
Customer Dashboard My Referrals card - WORKING
